skill_purpose: Demonstrate polite multi-phase dialogue for the agentic skill builder operator/expert pipeline.
target_audience: Agentic skill builder tests and humans learning the fixture layout.
operator_expectations: compileall on scripts/, scripts/build.py, scanners including rule_scanner_bindings.
rules_and_scanners: rules/*.md bound via rules/scanners.json to scanner_greet_warm and scanner_close_graceful.
constraints: Toy fixture only; no network except optional expert critique.
notes: Used as reference skill for §7–§8 LangGraph orchestration.
